productDisplayName: Scullers For Her Women Scullers Purple Tunics
description: Composition Purple pleated tunic top made of 100% viscose, has long puff sleeves, metallic embellishments on the centre of the chest and extended side seams Fitting Regular Wash care Dry clean only Do not bleach Steam iron When you want to look feminine effortlessly, try this purple tunic top from scullers.
